title: Local review skips advocate pass when no candidate Issues exist
description: A sanitized local-review scenario where AI-toolkit files change, but the primary review pass should produce no candidate Issues. The advocate pass must not run and the final output must not include the review-advocate skill marker.

scope.notes: Sanitized fixture models benign wording-alignment updates in the advocate skill and contract. The generic local review should stay issue-free, so Step 6 must not run.

mustCatch.description: When the primary review pass produces no candidate Issues, the final review should remain issue-free and must not invoke the advocate pass or emit the review-advocate verification marker.

mustNotFlag.description: The review must not emit `Skill used: review-advocate` when the primary pass produced no candidate Issues.

notes: Use this case to benchmark the advocate skip path through the generic local review prompt without expanding the harness task model.
